creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: Sorry for delay, I got mildly sidetracked on the initial QA double check for 12.0 coverage when it didn't build. This was due to postgis not building because I use pgsql=9.6 in my DEFAULT_VERSIONS. After postgis being fixed for compat with 9.6 I successfully tested with both default PostgreSQL 9.3 and PostgreSQL 9.6 set in DEFAULT_VERSIONS.
